title: Multiplayer Shooter FPS
description:
Multiplayer Shooter FPS is an advanced multiplayer first-person shooter game. You have three different game modes in the core of the kit: Free for All, Team Death Match, and Capture the Flag. There are four player classes and seven different kinds of weapons: Rifle, Sniper, Shotgun, Pistol, Grenade, Launcher, and Knife.Three different game modes:• Free for All

• Team Death Match

• Capture the Flag
Seven different kinds of weapons:• Rifle

• Sniper

• Shotgun

• Pistol

• Grenade

• Launcher

• Knife
Feature List:• 3 Game modes: Team Deathmatch, Free For All, and Capture of Flag, and 4 more optional: Demolition, Elimination, Cover Point, and Gun Race.

• Team Voice chat.

• Private and Public matches.

• Player Classes, 4 kinds of players classes with different load-outs (Assault, Engineer, Support, Recon)

• 8 different types of weapons: Rifle, Sniper, Shotgun, Pistol, Grenade, Molotov, Grenade Launcher, and Knife.

• Slide, Jump, Crouch, and Run player movement.

• Friend List.

• Pre-Match Lobby.

• Lobby chat

• Team selection and Auto-Team selection

• and much more
description_short: Multiplayer Shooter FPS is an advanced multiplayer first-person shooter game.
